root: ^Business is blooming! Not only Laï restablished commercial contracts with Ariëta, but also established a high-speed contract with both Ariëta and Ësie!
^High speed trains go fast, much faster than your normal passenger train so be sure to have your signals ready to handle many trains of different speeds
^Today should be my last day with you, but once you mastered a mix of all trains types, I'm sure you will no longer need me!
^Do your best for our last day!
